description_long: This object is a rectangular black flag attached to a slender vertical pole. The flag features a circular white emblem in the center, which contains text and a border, giving it an official or organizational appearance. The pole is thin and straight, likely made of metal or plastic, and supports the flag from one side. The flag itself appears to be made of fabric, with a smooth, matte finish and no visible signs of wear or damage. The emblem is clearly printed and contrasts sharply against the dark background. The overall design is simple, formal, and suitable for marking locations or representing an organization in an urban environment.
description: A black rectangular flag with a central white emblem, mounted on a slender vertical pole. The design is formal and well-defined, suitable for urban display.
description_view_0: The flag is fully visible with its emblem and text clearly displayed, pole on the left.
description_view_1: The flag is edge-on, showing only the thin profile of the pole and flag.
description_view_2: The flag is fully visible with its emblem and text, pole on the right.
description_view_3: The flag is edge-on, showing only the thin profile of the pole and flag.
attribute_flag_design: A solid black rectangular flag with a central circular white emblem containing text and a border, giving it an official or organizational look. The emblem is proportionally centered and occupies a moderate portion of the flag's area.
